authors: Antonis Kalogeropoulos Richard Fletcher Rasmus Kleis Nielsen a Department of Communication Sciences
Belgiumb Reuters Institute for the Study of Journalism
raw_title: Inequalities in Offline and Online News Media Environments Across Six Countries: The Role of Social Class and Interest in News
title_en: Inequalities in Offline and Online News Media Environments Across Six Countries: The Role of Social Class and Interest in News
title_zh: 六个国家线上线下新闻媒体环境中的不平等：社会阶层与新闻兴趣的作用
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了六个国家中，人们在获取线上和线下新闻时的不平等现象，特别关注社会阶层和新闻兴趣如何影响这些不平等。
plain_summary_en: This study examines inequalities in accessing online and offline news across six countries, focusing on how social class and interest in news contribute to these disparities.
research_direction_zh: 探索社会结构和个体兴趣如何塑造不同媒体环境中的新闻获取模式，以理解全球范围内的媒体不平等问题。
research_direction_en: Investigating how social structures and individual interests shape news access patterns across different media environments to understand media inequalities globally.
